profile.name: Akhila Abbagani
profile.title: Data Analyst
profile.bio: Data Analyst with 3+ years of experience delivering analytics, business intelligence, and cloud-based data solutions across healthcare and insurance domains. Experienced in SQL, Python, Power BI, Snowflake, Azure Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Azure Synapse Analytics for building scalable ETL pipelines, interactive dashboards, and analytical data models. Skilled at transforming complex data into actionable insights, improving reporting efficiency, and supporting data-driven business decisions through automation, data quality, and cross-functional collaboration.
